question: What role do pharmacists actually play in vaccination and public health compared to physicians?
topic: Corrects misconceptions about pharmacist qualifications that limit healthcare utilization and public

discovery_sources.text: Over 70% of all Americans receive vaccinations from pharmacies or pharmacists - verify current vaccination administration statistics
